text:
I can see there are 6 files in the folder:
1. 2nd module Notes by YGN.pdf
2. Basic_Elx_Mod_4_Notes(1).docx
3. IEC_Mod3_Op-Amp _Notes_Updated.pdf
4. IEC Module 5 Notes Merged Final-1.pdf
5. Module 1- AMB (updated).pdf
6. MODULE 2 NOTES.pdf

Most of these are PDF files, and one is a .docx file. Unfortunately, I cannot directly read PDF or DOCX files with the Read tool. I need to inform the user that I cannot read these file formats directly and suggest alternatives.

Wait, let me check if there are any text-based files or if I can extract text from these files using some command-line tools.
